description: The user slams its heel down upon the target, which may also confuse them. If it misses, the user is hurt instead.

name: Last Respects
description: The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies in the user's party, the greater its power.

name: Lumina Crash
description: The user unleashes a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

name: Order Up
description: The user attacks with elegant poise. If it has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats.

name: Jet Punch
description: The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. It is sure to strike first.

name: Spicy Extract
description: The user's incredibly spicy extract sharply boosts the target's Attack stat and harshly lowers their Defense.

name: Spin Out
description: The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage while harshly lowering the user's Speed stat.

name: Population Bomb
description: The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.

name: Ice Spinner
description: The user covers its feet in ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. It also destroys the terrain.

name: Glaive Rush
description: The user charges recklessly. Attacks on the user on the next turn always hit and will inflict double damage.

name: Salt Cure
description: The user salt cures the target, dealing damage every turn. Steel and Water types are strongly affected by this move.

name: Triple Dive
description: The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.

name: Mortal Spin
description: A spin attack that can eliminate such moves as Bind, Wrap and Leech Seed. It also poisons opposing Pokémon.

name: Doodle
description: The target's essence is captured in a sketch. This makes the Abilities of the user and its ally match the target's.

name: Fillet Away
description: The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.

name: Kowtow Cleave
description: The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.

name: Flower Trick
description: The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.

name: Torch Song
description: The user blows out raging flames as if singing, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.

name: Aqua Step
description: The user toys with the target and attacks using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.

name: Raging Bull
description: The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.

name: Make It Rain
description: The user throws out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.

name: Psyblade
description: The user rends with an ethereal blade. Its power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.

name: Hydro Steam
description: The user blasts out boiling-hot water. Its power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50%.

name: Ruination
description: The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.

name: Electro Drift
description: The user pierces its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more if it's supereffective.

name: Shed Tail
description: The user creates a decoy using its own HP, then swaps places with a party Pokémon in waiting.

name: Tidy Up
description: The user tidies up and removes entry hazards and Substitutes. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.

name: Snowscape
description: The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.

name: Pounce
description: The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.

name: Trailblaze
description: The user attacks as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork raises its Speed stat.

name: Chilling Water
description: The user attacks the target by showering it with cold water. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.

name: Hyper Drill
description: The user spins at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit through a move such as Protect or Detect.

name: Twin Beam
description: The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.

name: Rage Fist
description: The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more the user has been attacked, the greater the power.

name: Armor Cannon
description: The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. It also cuts the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.

name: Bitter Blade
description: The user focuses its bitter feelings into a slash. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken.

name: Double Shock
description: The user discharges all the electricity from its body. After this, the user loses the Electric type.

name: Gigaton Hammer
description: The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.

name: Comeuppance
description: The user retaliates against the foe that last inflicted damage on it with much greater power.

name: Aqua Cutter
description: Single Target This move's critical- hit ratio is boosted by 1 stage.

name: Blazing Torque
description: The user rams into the target with blazing energy. This may also leave the target with a burn.

name: Wicked Torque
description: The user rams into the target with malicious intent. This may put the target to sleep.

name: Noxious Torque
description: The user rams into the target with a poisonous end. This may also poison the target.

name: Combat Torque
description: The user rams into the target with great force. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

name: Magical Torque
description: The user rams into the target with a fae-like force. This may also confuse the target.

name: Blood Moon
description: The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon. This move can't be used twice in a row.

name: Matcha Gotcha
description: The user fires a blast of tea, restoring HP by up to half the damage dealt. This may also burn the target.

name: Syrup Bomb
description: The user sets off a gooey explosion, which causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.

name: Ivy Cudgel
description: The user strikes with a cudgel. It has a high critical hit chance, and its type changes with the user's mask.

name: Electro Shot
description: Single Target Raises Sp.Atk. by 1 stage, then attacks the next turn. Skips charge in rain.

name: Tera Starstorm
description: The user bombards the target with crystalline power. When used by Stellar Terapagos, this move damages all foes.

name: Fickle Beam
description: The user shoots a beam of light. Sometimes the user's heads shoot in unison, doubling the move's power.

name: Burning Bulwark
description: The user’s intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.

name: Thunderclap
description: The user attacks first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.

name: Mighty Cleave
description: Light from atop the user's head cleaves the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.

name: Tachyon Cutter
description: The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.

name: Hard Press
description: The target is crushed by the user. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.

name: Dragon Cheer
description: Allies’ morale is raised with a draconic cry, boosting their critical hit rate. This rouses Dragon types more.

name: Alluring Voice
description: The user attacks using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.

name: Temper Flare
description: The user desperately attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.

name: Supercell Slam
description: The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.

name: Psychic Noise
description: The user attacks with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP.

name: Upper Hand
description: The user strikes reactively, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority\rmove.

name: Malignant Chain
description: The user pours toxins into the target through a corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
